title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Linear programming problems
Convex functions - Linear programming problem- Graphical method -Basic
feasible solutions- Optimal solutions-additional topics of LPP-The Simplex
Method-The simplex method in tabular form- Tie breaking in simplex
method.

title: Module 2
content:
Transportation and assignment problems
Transportation problem - Formulation - Existence of solutions of
Transportation problems - Solutions of Transportation problem - Finding an
initial basic solution- Vogel’s approximation method-assignment problem- A
special algorithm for the assignment problem.

title: Module 3
content:
Netwok optimization models
The terminology of networks-The shortest path problem- Dijkstras
Algorithm-The minimum spanning tree problem- The maximum flow
problem- Ford Fulkerson algorithm- The minimum cost flow problem – The
network simplex method.

title: Module 4
content:
Theory of games
Introduction to game theory-Matrix(rectangular) games- Problem of game
theory-Minimax theorem- Saddle point- Strategies and pay off- Theorems of
matrix games- Graphical solutions- Notion of dominance- Rectangular game
as an Linear programming problem.
